narrative: CDD screening of case KYC-2026-0042 (Meridian Digital Trading Ltd, an entity) for as-of 2026-07-15 fired 5 evaluable findings: a higher-risk industry (crypto), a potential PEP indicator tied to a 40% beneficial owner, an adverse-media allegation on the same owner, identified ownership of only 60% (below the 75% coverage target), and one 40% owner not yet verified. No potential sanctions/watchlist match was present. On the deterministic mapping these findings point to a recommended review track of EDD-Recommended. These are potential matches and allegations, not findings; each must be weighed against benign explanations and adjudicated by a qualified analyst before any conclusion.
disclaimer: CDD screening evidence and a recommended review track only; not a KYC/AML decision. No customer has been onboarded, exited, or risk-rated, no case disposition or closure has been recorded, and no regulatory filing has been made. A qualified analyst must adjudicate every finding.
